This SSOT fixes the C6 workdir tree, lifecycle, archive, repo-cache, store grant, and native-config invariant surface as generated documentation.

The generated pages are bound to `internal/workdir`, daemon workdir configuration, and C11 workspace grant evidence.

## Executable Assertions

- C6 Workspace materializes policy-approved filesystem state and does not decide C7 policy.
- Every task run uses an isolated run root and provider cwd is always the run workdir.
- NativeConfigVersion is deterministic, policy-bound, and content-bound before provider execution.
- Local archive manifests are terminal-run evidence and cleanup only removes expired archived runs.
- Store channel workspace roots require C11 grants and consent before C6 materialization.
- Repo cache and task workdir semantics remain separate even where cache maintenance is future adapter work.
